#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Orbiter reflection loop
# Finds substantive Claude Code sessions, passes them to a reflection
# agent that reads transcripts via >>>nyx<<< and stores insights in simaris.

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_DIR="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
STATE_DIR="${XDG_STATE_HOME:-$HOME/.local/state}/orbiter"
PROCESSED_FILE="$STATE_DIR/processed.txt"
LOCK_DIR="$STATE_DIR...
